svg.title: RemitChain system architecture
svg.desc: Three-layer architecture: sender side (mobile app, QIE Pass, QIE Wallet), blockchain core (smart contracts, QIE stablecoin, QIEDex, Oracle), and recipient side (claim interface, notification, bank/UPI offramp)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the sender mobile app UX')
sendPrompt('How does QIE Pass handle KYC for senders?')
sendPrompt('How does QIE Wallet connect for senders?')
sendPrompt('How do users buy QIE stablecoin to send remittances?')
sendPrompt('Explain the RemitChain.sol smart contract logic')
sendPrompt('How does the escrow vault work in RemitChain?')
sendPrompt('How does the KYCRegistry contract use QIE Pass?')
sendPrompt('How does QIE Stablecoin work in RemitChain?')
sendPrompt('How does the QIEDex price oracle feed work?')
sendPrompt('How does the recipient claim interface work?')
sendPrompt('How does the SMS or WhatsApp notification system work?')
sendPrompt('How does the bank or UPI off-ramp work for recipients?')
sendPrompt('How does QIE Pass work for recipients with no wallet?')
